name: Unity Mini Games Hub Relax
description: Dive into the ultimate relaxation collection with Unity Mini Games Hub Relax! Enjoy a huge variety of satisfying mini-games designed to relieve stress and kill time. From slicing fruits and carving Dalgona candy to defusing bombs and solving block puzzles, there is a challenge for every mood. Web Dev https://www.brightygames.com/ With colorful graphics and simple controls, it’s the perfect way to unwind and have fun instantly!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
